title: SpawnObject
description: Request to spawn an object in the simulator.

id.description: The ID of the object to be spawned.

type.description: The type of the object to be spawned.

configuration.description: The configuration name to be applied to the object to be spawned.

location.description: The location of the object to be spawned.

rotation.description: The rotation of the object to be spawned.

landmark.description: When present, the location is ignored and the object to be spawned will be placed at the landmark specified by this field.

tags.description: Tags or metadata to be associated with the object to be spawned

payloads.description: JSON payloads specific to the object to be spawned.
